title: euodia elliptica
intro: Euodia elliptica, also known as Chinese pepper, is a type of flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. Euodia elliptica has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
